zh.lifeSummary: Judith Vassall於1567年出生在英國戴文。她於大約1602年與*Rev. John(Henrici) Perry在英國哈普爾法爾波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1650年4月16日在英國哈普爾法爾波洛享年83歲。

nameMeanings.name: Vassall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Vassell
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): of Norman origin, a status name from Old French vassel ‘vassal, servant, dependent’ (from Late Latin vazallus), used for a retainer who was under the protection of a king or powerful lord.

variants.name: Vassallo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Domenic, Giuseppe, Sal, Antonio, Enrico, Gandolfo, Orazio, Agostino, Arcangelo, Baldassare.
Italian: from the medieval term vassallo ‘vassal’, hence a status name for a nobleman who was in the service of a king or powerful lord.

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Judith Vassall was born in 1567, in Devon, England. She married *Rev. John(Henrici) Perry about 1602, in Farnborough, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 16 April 1650, in Farnborough, Hampshire, England, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Judith Vassall est née en 1567, à Devon, Angleterre. Elle a épousé *Rev. John(Henrici) Perry environ 1602, à Farnborough, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 16 avril 1650, à Farnborough, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Judith Vassall wurde 1567 in Devon, England geboren. Sie hat um 1602 in Farnborough, Hampshire, England *Rev. John(Henrici) Perry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 16. April 1650 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Farnborough, Hampshire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Judith Vassall(은)는 1567년 영국 데폰에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1602년 영국 함프실르 패른버루그h에서 *Rev. John(Henrici) Perry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1650년 4월 16일 영국 함프실르 패른버루그h에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.
